ddls:
CREATE TABLE "interfaces" (
  "interface_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interface */,
  "interface_name" TEXT /* Full name of the interface */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation for the interface */,
  "type" INTEGER /* Type of the interface (e.g., AXI4, ACE) */,
  "master_component" INTEGER /* Master component for the interface */,
  "slave_component" INTEGER /* Slave component for the interface */,
  "width" INTEGER /* Width of the interface */,
  "id_width" INTEGER /* ID width of the interface */,
  "usage_description" TEXT /* Description of the usage of the interface */,
  "coherency" TEXT /* Coherency requirements for the interface */,
  "cache_allocation" TEXT /* Cache allocation for the interface */,
  "additional_configurations" TEXT /* Additional configurations for the interface */,
  "interface_status" TEXT /* Current status of the interface (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the interface */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the interface */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the interface */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the interface */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interface_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interfaces_slave_component FOREIGN KEY ("slave_component") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interfaces_master_component FOREIGN KEY ("master_component") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interfaces_width FOREIGN KEY ("width") REFERENCES interface_widths ("width_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interfaces_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES interface_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interface_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interface type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the interface type (e.g., AXI4, ACE) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interface type */,
  "standard" TEXT /* Standard or specification the interface type adheres to */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the interface type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the component (e.g., Processor, Memory) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the component */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the component */,
  "specifications" TEXT /* Detailed specifications of the component */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the component */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the component */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the component */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interface_widths" (
  "width_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each width */,
  "width_name" TEXT /* Name of the width (e.g., 128, 64, 32) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the width */,
  "standard" TEXT /* Standard the width adheres to */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the width */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("width_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interface_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "interface_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interface for this configuration */,
  "coherency" TEXT /* Coherency requirements for the interface */,
  "cache_allocation" TEXT /* Cache allocation for the interface */,
  "additional_configurations" TEXT /* Additional configurations for the interface */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the configuration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the configuration */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the configuration */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interface_configurations_interface_id FOREIGN KEY ("interface_id") REFERENCES interfaces ("interface_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interface_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "interface_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interface for this version */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the interface configuration */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the changes were made */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interface_versions_interface_id FOREIGN KEY ("interface_id") REFERENCES interfaces ("interface_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interface_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage event */,
  "interface_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interface for this usage */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date when the interface was used */,
  "usage_type" TEXT /* Type of usage (e.g., simulation, testing) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who recorded the usage */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the usage was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interface_usage_interface_id FOREIGN KEY ("interface_id") REFERENCES interfaces ("interface_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interface_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "interface_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interface being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the interface */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the interface was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who recorded the access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the access was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interface_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interface_access_interface_id FOREIGN KEY ("interface_id") REFERENCES interfaces ("interface_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interface_documentation" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each documentation entry */,
  "interface_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interface for this documentation */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., specification, user guide) */,
  "document_url" TEXT /* URL of the document */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the documentation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the documentation */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the documentation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the documentation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interface_documentation_interface_id FOREIGN KEY ("interface_id") REFERENCES interfaces ("interface_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interface_dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "interface_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interface that depends on another interface */,
  "dependent_interface_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interface being depended on */,
  "dependency_type" TEXT /* Type of dependency (e.g., data, control) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the dependency */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the dependency */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the dependency */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the dependency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interface_dependencies_interface_id FOREIGN KEY ("interface_id") REFERENCES interfaces ("interface_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interface_dependencies_dependent_interface_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_interface_id") REFERENCES interfaces ("interface_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "interface_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interface for this metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric (e.g., bandwidth, latency) */,
  "metric_value" TEXT /* Value of the metric */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was measured */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who recorded the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the metric */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_interface_id FOREIGN KEY ("interface_id") REFERENCES interfaces ("interface_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of the action (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "affected_table" TEXT /* Name of the table affected by the action */,
  "affected_row_id" INTEGER /* ID of the row affected by the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
